agentDescriptions.facilitator: Meeting orchestrator � design reviews, architecture sessions, sprint planning for AI platform development
agentDescriptions.project-manager: Ground truth tracker � Next.js 16, Supabase, Stripe, WebContainer integration status and dependencies
agentDescriptions.critic: Quality challenger � auth flow security, prompt injection risks, context window limits, billing edge cases
agentDescriptions.north-star: Product vision advocate � AI-powered creation platform positioning, Builder/Thinker experience quality
agentDescriptions.developer: Full-stack engineer � Next.js 16, React 19, Supabase auth/DB, Stripe webhooks, Vercel AI SDK, WebContainer runtime
agentDescriptions.architect: System design � context assembly, stage orchestration, prompt architecture, artifact flow, LLM integration patterns
agentDescriptions.designer: UI/UX specialist � Tailwind CSS 4, three-column layout, Builder panels, Thinker UI, artifact viewers, real-time state
agentDescriptions.security-reviewer: Auth & data security � Supabase RLS policies, OAuth flows, API protection, prompt injection mitigation
agentDescriptions.devops: Deployment & infrastructure � Vercel config, Supabase CLI, WebContainer sandboxing, COEP/COOP headers
agentDescriptions.tech-writer: Prompt engineer & docs � Builder/Thinker system prompts, stage instructions, injection formatting, architecture docs
agentDescriptions.domain-expert: AI platform specialist � multi-model orchestration, context window management, agent definition patterns
agentDescriptions.qa-engineer: Testing strategy � API endpoint validation, auth flow testing, billing integration, WebContainer isolation

result.projectSummary: AI-powered creation platform (Momentum) � structured 5-stage workflow (Define/Architect/Build/Refine/Ship) with Builder + Thinker dual AI surfaces. Next.js 16, React 19, Supabase, Stripe, WebContainers, Claude API.
